content.en:
"Ye Heavenly Realm God!"

The face of the giant mountain realm god changed, and he hurriedly said: "Ye Tianjie god, misunderstanding!"

However, Ye Tian didn't bother to talk to him, and shook his right hand in the void.

"Sun's Grip!"

This Eternal Dao Secret Technique alone directly crushed the body of the Giant Mountain Realm God.

The Giant Mountain Realm God was too weak for him, like an ant at all.

After slaying the Giant Force Realm God, Ye Tian let this Eternal Dao Realm leave here, and then he went straight to the Tianhe Dao Alliance.

Now, he finally knew that it was the Tianhe Dao Alliance that was targeting the Terrans!

Before, he had violently offended the Tianhe Dao Alliance, and the Giant Mountain Realm God was one of the Realm Gods of the Tianhe Dao Alliance.

Not to mention the Tianhe Dao Alliance, even if it is a powerful force like Tianhe Dao Mountain, he doesn't care about it.

Since the Tianhe Dao Alliance dares to attack the Eternal Dao Realm of the Human Race, let's prepare for his revenge!

......

TRW Headquarters.

The gods here are not yet aware of the danger.

Suddenly.

One by one, the Eternal Pillars were inserted into the earth, and these Eternal Pillars covered the Tianhe Dao Alliance.

In an instant, the power of the Eternal Pillar erupted.

And that's not all.

There was also a Chilin Ancient Spear that came straight in, conjuring up the phantom of the Chilin Ancient Tree, and a terrifying aura permeated out.

This moment.

The Eternal to 200 Dao Realms of the Tianhe Dao Alliance who had cultivated into the Eternal Dao Seed were affected one by one, and the Dao Seed became a demon seed, attacking those ordinary Eternal Dao Realms one after another.

Even the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm was very uncomfortable in such a situation.

Only the Realm God can withstand the influence of the Eternal Demon Pillar and the Chilin Ancient Spear.

"Who?"

One of the Heavenly Dao Alliance's Realm Gods came out and searched the surroundings with his will.

That's when it happened.

Ye Tian made a move.

Puff puff!!!

A Venerable Realm God was pierced through his body by Ye Tian's Tianyan Red Dragon Flame, and instantly turned into ashes.

In the blink of an eye, dozens of realm gods were all killed.

Followed by.

The power of the Eternal Demon Pillar continued to escape, and those half-step Eternal Realm God Realms all turned into demon seeds.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian erased the traces of his own shot, and then took away the Eternal Demon Pillar and the Chilin Ancient Spear and left here.

After Ye Tian left, these demon seeds of the Tianhe Dao Alliance began to attack the surrounding Eternal Realm, and the first of them was naturally the Great Sui Realm.

It didn't take long.

The Realm Court Branch got the news, and a group of Realm Gods came to support here, and when they saw that all the Bounded Gods of the Heavenly Alliance (CGDC) had fallen, those half-step Eternal Realm God Realm and Eternal Dao Body powerhouses had all turned into demon seeds, and they were extremely shocked and shocked.

However, it still took them a little time to extinguish these demon seeds, but this matter was so terrifying that they were all afraid, so they naturally notified the God of the Underworld as soon as possible.

At one time, dozens of realm gods fell, such a big event, the gods of the underworld naturally came.

He probed and found no useful information.

"Dozens of realm gods should have been killed in an instant, and those Eternal Supreme Dao Realms and half-step Eternal Realm God Realms that had cultivated into Eternal Dao Seeds had all turned into demon seeds, and it was very likely that they had been transformed into demon seeds by incomparably powerful demon seeds. "

"The murderer is very likely to be a demon seed comparable to the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm!"

The god of the underworld commented.

He didn't think of Ye Tian, after all, Ye Tian had no contradiction with the Tianhe Dao Alliance, how could Ye Tian come to kill the Tianhe Dao Alliance!

So, he didn't think of this question for a while.

Besides, when Ye Tian fought with him, he didn't expose so many Eternal Demon Pillars and Chilin Ancient Spears, so he didn't think about it in this direction at all.

As soon as they heard that it was a demon seed comparable to the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm, these realm gods panicked.

But.

The gods of the Underworld would patrol around, which made these gods feel a little more at ease, but they were also very scared.

As a result, many of the Realm Gods were going to stay in the Realm Division, or stay away from the Eternal Realm and find a remote place to practice.

......

Endless Realms Alliance.

Ye Tian received a message from the Realm Court.

"It seems that the Realm Court thought that a powerful demon seed had broken into the Eternal Realm, but I didn't expect this matter to have something to do with me!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But the destruction of the Tianhe Dao Alliance does not mean that those realm gods no longer have the idea of fighting the Endless Realm Alliance.

He still needs to stand up once to avoid these little troubles.

"How can you stand now?"

Ye Tian was thinking about this.

Suddenly.

He thought of a solution.

"Aren't those realm gods man-made that this matter has something to do with the demon seeds, I will take this opportunity to show that the hidden demon seeds in places like the Abyss of Despair will be cleared, and all these demon seeds will be killed. In this way, all the gods of the realm will fear me!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

That's how he got the message out, and his first target was the Blood Abyss in the Eternal Realm, a place even more dangerous than the Abyss of Despair!

The Blood Abyss is an extremely dangerous place in the Eternal Realm, and even the Realm God, if he stays there for a long time, he may turn into a demon.

Even a powerhouse like the God of the Netherworld didn't dare to directly enter the blood abyss.

Originally.

The Demon Seed Abyss failed to invade the Eternal Realm, and a group of Demon Seeds hid in the blood abyss, and the gods of the Underworld did not dare to hunt down and kill.

Therefore, if he wiped out the blood abyss, he would definitely shock the entire Eternal Realm.

......

Boundary Division.

When the God of the Underworld heard that Ye Tian was going to exterminate the Blood Abyss, he was also extremely shocked.

"Ye Heavenly Realm God, he dares to enter the blood abyss?"

When the other realm gods heard that Ye Tian was going to enter the blood abyss, their first thought was to laugh, thinking that Ye Tian was not self-sufficient and was grandstanding, and they didn't think that Ye Tian really wanted to kill into the blood abyss.

However.

Not long after, Ye Tian personally descended to the Blood Abyss, and did not hide his whereabouts at all, so he was naturally known by some realm gods.

As a result, some realm gods also came to the blood abyss to see if Ye Tian really dared to enter.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the entrance of the blood abyss, and under the gaze of many realm gods, he directly entered the inside of the blood abyss.

The energy of the blood abyss was very weird, but it couldn't affect Ye Tian.

After a while, he was surrounded by a group of demon seeds, most of them were very weak demon seeds, there were also some demon seeds comparable to the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, and a few demon seeds comparable to the Eternal Realm God Realm.

Ye Tian made a move and easily killed these demon seeds.

Soon, those powerful demon seeds came out one after another.

However, Ye Tian's strength was too terrifying, he kept bombarding these demon seeds, and then threw these demon corpses out of the blood abyss.
